eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Bryan, OK; at 09:39 PM ON FEB 27, 2026 Effective until 03:39 AM FEB 28, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
